title: Self-Inspection vs External GMP Audit
alt: Side-by-side comparison of internal self-inspection and external GMP audit

left.heading: Self-Inspection
points: Internal review against EU GMP Chapter 9
Continual-improvement loop owned by the site
Ranges freely across your own systems over time

right.heading: External GMP Audit
points: Triggered by qualification, contract or schedule
Scoped to a defined activity, product or contract
Can decide supplier approval or licence status
